## Checklist

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for conventions.

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./... -race`, `go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`gofmt` / `go fmt`)
- [ ] If this changes HTTP/API behavior, [`api/openapi.yaml`](../api/openapi.yaml) was updated when applicable
- [ ] If this adds or renames top-level `docs/*.md` files, [README.md](../README.md)’s documentation table was updated
- [ ] If this adds or renames `.cursor/rules/` or `.cursor/skills/` entries, [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) was updated
